title: Wilson Lattice QCD Through EML

analysis.object: T805: Wilson Lattice QCD Through EML depth analysis

plaquettes_eml0.description: Plaquettes: products of SU(N) link variables -- EML-0 compact group elements

wilson_action_eml1.description: Wilson action: exp(-S_W) = exp(sum beta*ReTr(U_p)) -- EML-1 exponential

path_integral_eml2.description: Path integral Z = int DU exp(-S): measure DU is Haar measure -- EML-2 (logarithmic integration)

wilson_loop_eml3.description: Wilson loop W(C) = Tr P exp(i oint A) -- oscillatory path-ordered exponential

area_law_confinement.description: Area law: <W(C)> ~ exp(-sigma * Area(C)) -- EML-1 exponential decay with area

lattice_captures.description: Lattice captures {EML-0, EML-1, EML-2}. Wilson loops (EML-3) are measurable but continuum limit needs EML-3 control.
lattice_captures.reason: Missing: controlled EML-3 extension of lattice

t805_theorem.description: T805: Wilson lattice = {EML-0,EML-1,EML-2} structure. EML-3 Wilson loops are measurable on lattice. Continuum limit needs controlled EML-3 to EML-3 (or EML-inf) passage. T805.
t805_theorem.reason: The EML-3 extension is the target for Phase 2

analysis.theorem: T805: Wilson Lattice QCD Through EML (S1084).

key_theorem: T805: Wilson Lattice QCD Through EML (S1084).
